name: anime1
description: Monorepo for anime1-cli: a CLI and a reusable engine (anime1-core) to browse and download from anime1.me.

scripts.build: npm run build -w anime1-core && npm run build -w anime1-cli
scripts.lint: npm run build -w anime1-core && npm run lint -w anime1-core && npm run lint -w anime1-cli
scripts.dev: npm run build -w anime1-core && npm run dev -w anime1-cli
